brand_identity.name: BikerTechie
brand_identity.mission: Empowering enterprise growth through scalable cloud solutions and intelligent AI automation.

headings.usage: All section headers, hero titles, and card titles.

body.usage: Paragraphs, navigation, buttons, and form labels.

mono.usage: Code snippets, technical metrics, or tiny accent labels.

navbar.specs: fixed top-4 left-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-md shadow-lg

buttons.primary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 text-white font-medium hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: h-11 px-8 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/50 p-8 transition-all hover:border-violet-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.1)]
cards.feature_card: p-6 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors

forms.input: h-12 bg-slate-950/50 border-white/10 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-violet-500/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-slate-500
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-2 block

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Ensure backdrop-blur-xl is used with very low opacity backgrounds (e.g., bg-slate-950/60).
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow or box-shadow with color to create neon glow on active elements.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use 'via' stops to create rich, deep gradients (e.g., from-slate-950 via-slate-900 to-slate-950).
visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay to the background if possible, or keep it clean deep slate.

hero_bg.description: Use as a background element or hero visual, darkened with an overlay.

abstract_cube.description: Use for 'AI Solutions' or specific feature highlight.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 24px (w-6 h-6). Color: text-violet-400 or text-cyan-400.

home: Value Prop (3 cols - Speed, Scale, Security)
Why Choose Us (Split layout: Text + Image)

universal_guidelines: Always use the dark theme by default.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA/WCAG AA).
Interactive elements must have a :hover state (glow or lift).
Use 'Inter' font for all body text.
Do NOT use gradients on small text; only on large headings.
Animations: Use framer-motion for simple fade-ins (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).
Use the provided Logo URL in the Navbar and Footer.
Display the Google Cloud Partner badge in the Footer or Hero.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' and 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' if not present.
Implement the 'Navbar' as a sticky, glassmorphic element.
Ensure the 'Contact' form connects to the FastAPI backend (create a placeholder fetch call).
Use the provided image URLs for their respective sections.
